अर्धम, a purification, one has to purify, now what is this purification, the shastra always
talks about, आत्म विशुद्धी, what is this purification, so Prabhupada is mentioned
here, the purification is the purification of the impact of the three modes, purification
of the influence of the three modes, the basic idea is that we are आत्म, here it is said
आत्म विशुद्धी, we are all actually spirit souls, but then there is a contamination,
we are under some conditions, the contamination means these three modes, and the three modes
will impose conditions on us.
But as a spirit soul we don't like these conditions, we want to be free, we want to
be powerful, we want to do whatever we want to, and one of the influence of these three
modes is that one wants to exploit the resources, for his own sense enjoyment.
The basic thing that he thinks is, I am this body, let me exploit everything for body's
comfort.
Always tries to keep the body very comfortable, little bit of discomfort he cannot tolerate,
and little bit of pain, little bit of suffering he doesn't want to tolerate.
This is the mood of a living entity.
In this world everybody is running behind how they can enhance their enjoyment.
This is how the body can be.
आत्म विशुद्धी, we are all actually spirit souls.

creating facilities will not save you from this contamination, will not save you from this conditions of life.
So Western civilization means simply they enhance the money, money, money, in order to cover up the defects of the culture.
हु, जब कल्चर में नहीं आगा तो एवं बच्ची के साथ सबस्ताब करने के लिए लोग पर करेंगे, कि आगे के बास एक सबस्ताब को बताने के लिए जिदा करेंगे …
यह बिंदगभी ने इसलिए अधार। Big money, lighting, all facilities and machines and this and that.
But such a civilization cannot exist. Culture has to be there at the family level,
culture has to be there at the civil Vallat level.
What is culture at the family level?
The man, he works honestly to his best capacity and he brings money to the house and the wife, very intelligently, whatever money comes, very intelligently she manages the house.
She doesn't complain about how much money has been brought to the house.
She will not complain. As soon as the man comes, she will not harass. Why only this much? I want more. Where is my abaran? Where is my saree? Where is my one more cupboard?
She rather, whatever money comes, by the honest endeavour of the man, she takes that and very intelligently she manages the family.
Even now we see some families,
families like that, wife will never complain.
She has great respect for the husband and for his hard endeavour and whatever comes, she very expertly utilises for running the family.
You know, only in some old movies we see such families depicted.
In very old movies, I don't know your generation, my generation, I used to see such movies.
You know, husband comes with only, I think one rupee or something. Wife manages everything in that.
She will not disclose their internal things to outsiders.
Very carefully she manages the whole set up.
And when she, you know, gives comfort to the husband, because,
you know, he has worked hard and came with pleasing words, he has to be comforted.
And the next day again he goes for the hard work.
See, families are collapsing because there is no culture in the family.
Where is this training for the woman to be like that and man to be like that?
Where is this training? Where is this culture?
So, both man and woman simply running behind, making their bodies comfortable.
They are not interested in Swagurum Harim, how to worship Hari, so that their conditions will come down.
They can minimise and simplify their lives.
To simplify life, no, it is not possible, not easy.
Like I asked one person, he was asking me, what is this simplification of the life means?
Then I asked, okay, in your house, how many cupboards you have of your clothes?
He told some, half a dozen.
I said, can you make it into just four pairs?
He said, not possible, Swamiji.
Can you make it into just four?
Or can you make it into half a dozen?
Okay, two for official purpose, or three, and three for your internal purposes.
Can you make it?
He said, no, not possible.
They may have, say, half a dozen cars.
You go and ask, can you reduce one car?
How dare you are asking me to reduce one car?
It is my social symbol, my prestige, you know.
I want to enhance one more, one more car, two more cars.
Not easy to simplify.
Unless he understands that my goal is Shraddhayatma Vishuddhadham.
He understands that my goal is to purify the soul.
The tendency to lord it over, that is coming from the three modes.
And if I can purify myself, those tendencies will not push me.
By simply enhancing bodily comforts and bodily enjoyment.
That will not satisfy the Atma anyway.
So to reduce these forces of the modes,
so that he can really change his life and simplify his life.
Otherwise we are forced.
Nobody will make it simplified.
So that's why so nice actually here,
Prabhupada is saying, these orders are created.
Brahmanic culture is created.
So that people can happily practice.
Ajanti, Swagurum Hari.
Worship the Supreme Lord.
Feed the Supreme Lord.
Naivedya.
People have no time for their own lives.
Now how will they be able to take care of the Supreme Person?
In the form of a deity.
It is not easy.
That is why you require Swagurum.
Actually in this age,
deity worship alone is not sufficient for purification.
It is not alone to self-realize or to uncondition ourselves.
The recommended process is one has to chant,
Hare Krishna, Hare Krishna, Krishna Krishna, Hare Krishna.
Hare Hare, Hare Rama, Hare Rama, Rama Rama, Hare Hare.
So this is called Bhagavath Dharma.
And deity worship is called Pancharatrika.
And both have to go on parallelly.
Deity worship is also compulsory,
particularly in the beginning days.
Because it will take us out of agitations in the mind.
The agitations and bodily concepts
which are agitating our mind.
If we want to, restlessness has to be reduced.
Then deity worship is essential.
And then once you have little restlessness has come down,
then you can chant nicely.
And when you chant nicely,
then you will do deity worship very nicely.
You can feel the presence of the Lord.
And when you do deity worship nicely,
then you will chant nicely.
So both the processes will help each other.
And then we can go out of the conditions.
Otherwise our life becomes complicated.
And then we don't find any energy
and any life in our day to day existence.
Any questions?
Keechai.
Shri Matbhago Tham Keechai.
